MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-02-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. JEFFREY D. KIRK OF O'CONNER AND ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 1-415-693-9960 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KELLY A. WOODRUFF, TEL. NO. 1-415-305-1019 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT QUOTIENT TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT of plaintiff DomainsCable Inc. and for monetary sanctions is DENIED. DomainsCable's request for monetary sanctions is also denied. Quotient has not shown the complaint was filed for an improper purpose or that it is indisputably without merit, either legally or factually, as required by CCP 128.7(b). Rather, without having prevailed on any prior motion in the case or having obtained any dispositive concessions in discovery, Quotient's motion merely relies on its account of disputed facts giving rise to the current action. Notwithstanding that Quotient's motion lacks merit and it should have instead litigated disputed facts in the normal course by motion and discovery, the motion is not itself sanctionable. DomainsCable has not shown that the motion was filed for an improper purpose, the motion was beyond the scope of what section 128.7 permits, or that Quotient lacked any evidentiary or legal support for the positions it took on the motion. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR # 12313 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-20-2017 Set For Trial On Nov-13-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
